properties.description: The persistent or local URI identifying this aggregation.
URI of the `heritage-object` (the "Cultural Heritage Object") this aggregation wraps (edm:aggregatedCHO).
URI of the primary `digital-representation` used to display the object, e.g. a high-resolution image or 3D model (edm:isShownBy).
URI of a landing page where the object can be viewed in its original context, e.g. the providing institution's own website (edm:isShownAt).
URIs of additional `digital-representation`(s) for this object beyond the primary one in `isShownBy` (edm:hasView).
URI of a thumbnail image representing the aggregation (edm:object).
Name of the institution that physically holds the object and supplied this metadata (edm:dataProvider).
Name of the aggregator that submitted the data on the data provider's behalf, e.g. an ECCCH national aggregator (edm:provider).
URI of a rights statement governing reuse of the aggregated content, typically from rightsstatements.org or a Creative Commons license (edm:rights).
